)
target_include_directories(donner_svg_renderer_tests_text_engine_helpers_tests PRIVATE ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR})
set_target_properties(donner_svg_renderer_tests_text_engine_helpers_tests PROPERTIES CXX_STANDARD 20 CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED YES)
target_compile_options(donner_svg_renderer_tests_text_engine_helpers_tests PRIVATE -fno-exceptions)
add_test(NAME donner_svg_renderer_tests_text_engine_helpers_tests COMMAND donner_svg_renderer_tests_text_engine_helpers_tests)
set_tests_properties(donner_svg_renderer_tests_text_engine_helpers_tests PROPERTIES
  ENVIRONMENT "RUNFILES_DIR=${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}")
target_link_libraries(donner_svg_renderer_tests_text_engine_helpers_tests PRIVATE donner_base_base donner_base_xml_components_components donner_svg_components_components_core donner_svg_components_layout_layout_system donner_svg_components_style_components donner_svg_components_text_components donner_svg_components_text_text_system donner_svg_core_core donner_svg_text_text_backend donner_svg_text_text_backend_simple donner_svg_text_text_engine donner_svg_text_text_layout_params donner_svg_text_text_types gmock gmock_main)
if(DONNER_TEXT)
  target_link_libraries(donner_svg_renderer_tests_text_engine_helpers_tests PRIVATE donner_svg_resources_font_manager)
endif()
if(DONNER_TEXT_FULL)
  target_link_libraries(donner_svg_renderer_tests_text_engine_helpers_tests PRIVATE donner_svg_text_text_backend_full)
endif()
add_executable(donner_svg_renderer_tests_text_engine_tests
  TextEngine_tests.cc
)
target_include_directories(donner_svg_renderer_tests_text_engine_tests PRIVATE ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR})
set_target_properties(donner_svg_renderer_tests_text_engine_tests PROPERTIES CXX_STANDARD 20 CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED YES)
target_compile_options(donner_svg_renderer_tests_text_engine_tests PRIVATE -fno-exceptions)
add_test(NAME donner_svg_renderer_tests_text_engine_tests COMMAND donner_svg_renderer_tests_text_engine_tests)
set_tests_properties(donner_svg_renderer_tests_text_engine_tests PROPERTIES
  ENVIRONMENT "RUNFILES_DIR=${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}")
target_link_libraries(donner_svg_renderer_tests_text_engine_tests PRIVATE donner_base_base donner_base_base_test_utils donner_base_xml_components_components donner_svg_components_components_core donner_svg_components_layout_layout_system donner_svg_components_style_components donner_svg_components_text_components donner_svg_components_text_text_system donner_svg_core_core donner_svg_text_text_backend donner_svg_text_text_backend_simple donner_svg_text_text_engine donner_svg_text_text_layout_params donner_svg_text_text_types gmock gmock_main rules_cc_runfiles)
if(DONNER_TEXT)
  target_link_libraries(donner_svg_renderer_tests_text_engine_tests PRIVATE donner_svg_resources_font_manager)
endif()
if(DONNER_TEXT_FULL)
  target_link_libraries(donner_svg_renderer_tests_text_engine_tests PRIVATE donner_svg_text_text_backend_full)
endif()
